arts.ttl: Italiano aware of Liverpool ‘danger’, ‘Bologna have to do better’
arts.sum: Bologna coach Vincenzo Italiano is excited for his first ever game at Anfield on Wednesday...

arts.ttl: Ex-Liverpool boss Jurgen Klopp reveals stance on next job - 'There is nothing to say'
arts.sum: Former Liverpool manager Jurgen Klopp has commented on speculation linking him with the German national team, just months after he hinted he had no plans to return to the dugout

arts.ttl: What Alisson Becker told Dominik Szoboszlai in private about Liverpool transformation
arts.sum: The Liverpool goalkeeper opted for a daring new look in the latest chapter of his Reds career

arts.ttl: Chiesa out of Liverpool's Champions League match against Bologna but Jota available
arts.sum: Chiesa, who has played only 68 minutes across three matches since joining from Juventus late in the transfer window, sustained an injury in training on Monday, and Liverpool manager Arne Slot said it is enough to rule the Italy international out of contention. Liverpool forward Federico Chiesa will miss the Champions League match against Bologna on Wednesday because of injury but Diogo Jota is available after a minor issue.

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp makes his stance clear on Germany national team role as former Liverpool boss receives Order of Merit in lavish Berlin ceremony
arts.sum: Former Liverpool manager Jurgen Klopp has shot down any speculation linking him with the Germany national team role.

arts.ttl: Liverpool lineup vs. Bologna: Arne Slot urged to show trait that helped him get job
arts.sum: Liverpool expert David Lynch tells Sports Mole that the Champions League tie with Bologna is a perfect chance for Arne Slot to showcase a trait which helped him get the job.

arts.ttl: Everton and Liverpool set for imminent FIFA rule decision that could change transfers forever
arts.sum: Transfer news as current FIFA rules surrounding player moves are under the microscope thanks to Lassana Diarra's decade-long battle with the governing body

arts.ttl: Slot warns Liverpool that Bologna can copy Atalanta triumph
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot warns his team must learn the lessons taught by Atalanta and...

arts.ttl: Slot on Liverpool: 'We cannot accept mediocrity'
arts.sum: Arne Slot has said he will not accept "mediocrity " at Liverpool as they look to build on their encouraging start to his first season in charge.

arts.ttl: New Liverpool signing will MISS Champions League clash with Bologna after injury setback - as Arne Slot learns Diogo Jota's fate after fitness concern during win over Wolves
arts.sum: One of Liverpool's summer signings will miss the Champions League clash with Bologna after sustaining a minor issue in training.
